panels.description: Transaction volume over time grouped by swarmId, callId, and businessCode. Use this to spot traffic spikes and distribution changes across transaction groups.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
  concat(
    "swarmId",
    ' | ',
    "callIdKey",
    ' | ',
    "businessCodeKey"
  ) AS "series",
  count(*) AS "txns"
FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Tx outcomes (count)

panels.description: p95 processor round-trip duration over time, grouped by swarmId, callId, and businessCode. Use this panel to monitor latency regressions in each transaction group.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
  concat(
    "swarmId",
    ' | ',
    "callIdKey",
    ' | ',
    "businessCodeKey"
  ) AS "series",
  approx_percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "processorDurationMs") AS "p95_duration_ms"
FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Processor duration p95 (ms)

panels.description: Processor success rate by swarmId, callId, and businessCode for the selected time range. Sorted by transaction volume for quick triage.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
  concat("swarmId", ' | ', "callIdKey", ' | ', "businessCodeKey") AS "series",
  avg("processorSuccess") * 100 AS "success_pct"
FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Processor success by swarm/call/businessCode

panels.description: Business success rate by swarmId, callId, and businessCode for the selected time range. Compare with processor success to distinguish technical vs business failures.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
  concat("swarmId", ' | ', "callIdKey", ' | ', "businessCodeKey") AS "series",
  avg("businessSuccess") * 100 AS "success_pct"
FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Business success by swarm/call/businessCode

panels.description: Top transaction groups by volume with latency and success metrics. Grouping is always swarmId + callId + businessCode.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  "swarmId",
  "callIdKey" AS "callId",
  "businessCodeKey" AS "businessCode",
  count(*) AS "txns",
  avg("processorDurationMs") AS "avg_duration_ms",
  approx_percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "processorDurationMs") AS "p95_duration_ms",
  avg("processorSuccess") * 100 AS "processor_success_pct",
  avg("businessSuccess") * 100 AS "business_success_pct"
FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
GROUP BY "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
ORDER BY "txns" DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Top groups by swarm/call/businessCode

panels.description: Maximum processor duration per time bucket, grouped by swarmId, callId, and businessCode. This anomaly view highlights worst-case latency spikes.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
  concat(
    "swarmId",
    ' | ',
    "callIdKey",
    ' | ',
    "businessCodeKey"
  ) AS "call",
  max("processorDurationMs") AS "latency_max_ms"
FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Latency max (ms) by callId-businessCode (interval)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT "swarmId" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") ORDER BY "swarmId"
list.label: Swarm
list.name: swarm
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT "swarmId" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") ORDER BY "swarmId"

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT "callIdKey" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND "callIdKey" <> 'unknown' ORDER BY "callIdKey" LIMIT 200
list.label: Call ID
list.name: callId
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT "callIdKey" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND "callIdKey" <> 'unknown' ORDER BY "callIdKey" LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT "businessCodeKey" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND "businessCodeKey" <> 'n/a' ORDER BY "businessCodeKey" LIMIT 200
list.label: Business Code
list.name: businessCode
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT "businessCodeKey" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND "businessCodeKey" <> 'n/a' ORDER BY "businessCodeKey" LIMIT 200
